graceful_decommission_timeout.description: Duration to wait for node decommissioning during cluster scaling or deletion, must be a valid duration string (e.g., "10m", "1h").

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the cluster, such as environment or project identifiers.

name.description: Unique identifier for the Dataproc cluster, must comply with Google Cloud naming conventions.

timeouts.description: Defines the maximum duration for specific operations on the Dataproc cluster, such as creation, update, or deletion.

virtual_cluster_config.description: Defines the configuration for a virtual cluster, including Kubernetes settings and software configurations, required for running Dataproc workloads.
virtual_cluster_config.type: list(object({staging_bucket: optional(string),auxiliary_services_config: list(object({metastore_config: list(object({dataproc_metastore_service: optional(string)})),spark_history_server_config: list(object({dataproc_cluster: optional(string)}))})),kubernetes_cluster_config: list(object({kubernetes_namespace: optional(string),gke_cluster_config: list(object({gke_cluster_target: optional(string),node_pool_target: list(object({node_pool: string,roles: list(string),node_pool_config: list(object({locations: list(string),autoscaling: list(object({max_node_count: optional(number),min_node_count: optional(number)})),config: list(object({local_ssd_count: optional(number),machine_type: optional(string),min_cpu_platform: optional(string),preemptible: optional(bool),spot: optional(bool)}))}))}))})),kubernetes_software_config: list(object({component_version: map(string),properties: optional(map(string))}))}))}))
